summary: PASS. The contract preserves frontier orchestration, economical isolated workers, executable acceptance authority, exactly one raw-failure retry, evidence-based task-type routing, conditional cross-family semantic review, and the Beads/Vault/Ringer/Paperclip/Ringside authority boundaries. Its two worker lanes have disjoint owned paths, its acceptance gates and falsifiers are independently testable, and its rollback does not mutate the dirty Aegis checkout.
advisories: Keep each lane's targeted check scoped to its owned paths; gate cross-lane behavior only after both patches are integrated.
Canonicalize the semantic contract field set before SHA-256 so JSON key order cannot affect the hash.
The pre-dispatch contract PASS cannot satisfy the separate post-integration semantic-review gate; run that Judge fresh.
